name: 15oz Stoneware Tilley Mug Dark Gray - Threshold™: Traditional Coffee Mug, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, 15.21oz Capacity
description: Sip your favorite beverage in fun style with this 15-Ounce Stoneware Tilley Mug from Threshold™. In a classic design with a round handle for a comfy grip, this stoneware mug showcases an allover textured detailing for a charming look you'll appreciate. It’s microwave safe so you can reheat your beverages, and also dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Great for everything from your morning cup of coffee to a soothing serving of evening tea, this stoneware mug is a must-have beverage companion.
